item.title: I'm officially the most normal girl in the whole world, they just announced it
item.description: I'm officially the most normal girl in the whole world, they just announced it

item.title: An expressionless Weyes Blood with the caption 'I'm on here reading your tweets and not saying anything'
item.description: An expressionless Weyes Blood with the caption 'I'm on here reading your tweets and not saying anything'

item.title: Michael Caine in 'A Muppet Christmas Carol' hanging out of the window and saying 'You there, gayboy, what month is it?'
item.description: Michael Caine in 'A Muppet Christmas Carol' hanging out of the window and saying 'You there, gayboy, what month is it?'

item.title: 'Young Female Playwright' on the marquee at the Paradise Cinema in Toronto
item.description: 'Young Female Playwright' on the marquee at the Paradise Cinema in Toronto

item.title: Dana's cats Snufkin and Winnipeg sitting in the sunlight on the hardwood floor and coffee table above
item.description: Dana's cats Snufkin and Winnipeg sitting in the sunlight on the hardwood floor and coffee table above

item.title: Dana's foot in her strappy black flat held up in front of a blue cloudy sky
item.description: Dana's foot in her strappy black flat held up in front of a blue cloudy sky

item.title: Syd's out-of-focus thumbs up in front of the Toronto skyline
item.description: Syd's out-of-focus thumbs up in front of the Toronto skyline

item.title: A pink stiletto heel stepping delicately into a bear trap
item.description: A pink stiletto heel stepping delicately into a bear trap

item.title: Black strappy heels with white socks underneath, muddily stepping into a river, under a pink skirt
item.description: Black strappy heels with white socks underneath, muddily stepping into a river, under a pink skirt

item.title: 'I never see you at the club'. Okay? I never see you enjoying the splendor of film in your local cinema with a medium popcorn and a crisp diet coke
item.description: 'I never see you at the club'. Okay? I never see you enjoying the splendor of film in your local cinema with a medium popcorn and a crisp diet coke
